title_original: Projekt ORION: Umetna inteligenca za varno mejno kontrolo
title_en_gloss: Project ORION: Artificial intelligence for safe border control
verification_priority_reason: Could add a smaller-language authoritative public-sector deployment row for policing/border-control governance analysis.
authority_upgrade_target: direct authoritative page or direct publisher URL with extractable full text or metadata
hostile_reviewer_value: Upgrades title-only multilingual leads into an explicit verification queue instead of letting weak discovery traces masquerade as case evidence.
dashboard_view: Public-sector AI deployment map and policing/border-control topology.
paper_use: Reviewer-safe multilingual appendix row; public-sector AI border-pilot table; methods note on direct-source extraction from a Slovenian police page.
current_blocker: The source now contains richer technical language, but manuscript use still needs caution because the page is project-descriptive, translation-assisted, and not by itself proof of production deployment, legality, or effectiveness.
next_verification_step: Check linked funding-section and partner/project pages for direct project documentation, then decide whether the row belongs in deployment, biometric/privacy-tension, or border-risk tables.
direct_source_title_verified: Projekt ORION: Umetna inteligenca za varno mejno kontrolo
current_claim_ceiling: Authoritative police page supports bounded claims about project existence, stated border-management purpose, AI involvement, and the site-level framing of privacy/legal-compliance aims; operational deployment and normative implications still need careful extraction.
support_note: Direct Slovenian police source URL resolved in this cycle via policija.si search results. The page title matches the prior title gloss and the page text states that Project ORION is intended to improve border management with the help of artificial intelligence, aiming at next-generation secure, reliable, and privacy-preserving border control.
resolved_source_excerpt_sl: Projekt ORION ... je namenjen izboljšanju upravljanja meja, tudi s pomočjo umetne inteligence. Cilj je varna, zanesljiva in zasebnost ohranjajoča mejna kontrola naslednje generacije.
source_extraction_note: Full police-page articleBody extracted locally; six sub-goals, TRL-7 ambition, encrypted-biometric-processing language, and three pilot scenarios captured with bounded English glosses.

title_original: Tekoäly laatii nyt täysin järjettömiä valituksia – poliisilakimies turhautui: ”Viitataan tapauksiin, joita ei ole”

authority_upgrade_target: direct publisher URL with extractable full text or metadata
hostile_reviewer_value: Keeps a potentially article-friendly procedural-contamination lead in queue without overstating title-only evidence.
dashboard_view: Timeline and heatmap for AI contamination of legal/administrative process in non-English jurisdictions.
paper_use: Methods/limitations section plus first multilingual case appendix or seed table for LIMEN article package.
current_blocker: Direct Yle page resolution and exact institutional context remain unverified.
next_verification_step: Resolve direct Yle page and extract exact institutional setting plus whether the cited non-existent cases were in appeals, complaints, or reports.
resolution_attempt_note: Google News RSS URL redirects to consent.google.com. Yle robots.txt disallows /haku, yle.fi/haku returned 404, and no direct article URL was resolved in this bounded cycle.

title_original: AI üle inimaju? Tehisintellekt kukutas Saaremaa gümnasisti eksklikult eksamil läbi

next_verification_step: Resolve the article and determine whether AI made, suggested, or merely informed the failing decision; look for school or ministry follow-up.
